data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of calendar synchronization with Google/Outlook. However, there is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms the functionality of this integration. The prior step evidence does not include any successful API reads or state checks that demonstrate the calendar sync feature is operational, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the operational status of the calendar sync feature with Google/Outlook.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
